creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
acer# uname -a
FreeBSD acer.lissyara.int.otradno.ru 8.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT #0: 
Fri Aug 29 04:16:32 MSD 2008 
root@acer.lissyara.int.otradno.ru:/var/tmp/obj/usr/src/sys/main-color-console 
  amd64

some behavior - system hang when X start, with

vgapci0@pci0:1:5:0:     class=0x030000 card=0x009f1025 chip=0x59751002 
rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
     vendor     = 'ATI Technologies Inc'
     device     = 'Radeon XPRESS 200M SERIES'
     class      = display
     subclass   = VGA

but, with dri enabled. System work, but X server get all resourse, and 
system very slow response - shutdown system by short press power button 
- 10-15 minutes...

Without hardware acceleration - all OK
